g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the frontend layer of a prefetch viewer')
sendPrompt('What does the file upload flow look like in the prefetch viewer?')
sendPrompt('What REST API endpoints does the prefetch viewer expose?')
sendPrompt('How should the Actix-web backend be structured for the prefetch viewer?')
sendPrompt('What API endpoints should the Rust backend have for the prefetch viewer?')
sendPrompt('How should errors be handled in the Rust prefetch parser backend?')
sendPrompt('How does the Rust prefetch binary parser work? Walk me through the byte-level parsing.')
sendPrompt('How does MAM decompression work for Windows 10+ prefetch files?')
sendPrompt('What fields should be in the JSON output of the prefetch parser?')
sendPrompt('Should the prefetch viewer support batch analysis of multiple files?')
sendPrompt('How should the prefetch viewer export reports?')
